apiInfo.title: Withdrawal Quote API
apiInfo.description: A single, standardized **POST** quote endpoint for withdrawal transactions.

fieldInstances.description: Unique policy number (1 to 30 characters).
Optional firm/linkage identifier (preferred location per IRI).
Optional client-supplied identifier to trace the request.

fieldInstances.constraints: enum=[COSTOFINSURANCE, EXPENSECHARGE, UNITEXPENSECHARGE, RIDERCHARGE, SURRENDERCHARGE, WITHDRAWALCHARGE]

fieldInstances.description: unique identification code. Optional; Required only when policyNumber is not globally unique.

fieldInstances.constraints: maxLength=30; enum=[RESIDENCE, BUSINESS, POBOXSEASONAL, APO, DPO, FPO]
enum=[CHECKING, SAVINGS, CREDITCARDACCOUNT, DEBITCARDACCOUNT, BROKERAGEACCOUNT, CERTIFICATEOFDEPOSITACCOUNT]

fieldInstances.description: Information about the producer submitting the request
Details of financial amounts associated with the full surrender request

Unique policy number (1 to 30 characters).
Optional firm/linkage identifier (preferred location per IRI).
Required for one-time partial withdrawal quotes. Not used for full surrenders. For one-time RMD quotes, select transactionSubType as rmd.
Optional client-supplied identifier to trace the request.

endpoints.description: Calculate a withdrawal quote for a **full surrender** transaction. This is a synchronous compute action
endpoints.responseCodesAndMediaTypes: 200: application/json; 400: application/json; 401: application/json; 403: application/json; 404: application/json; 405: application/json; 406: application/json; 409: application/json; 413: application/json; 415: application/json; 422: application/json; 429: application/json; 500: application/json; 502: application/json; 503: application/json; 504: application/json

endpoints.description: Calculate a quote for a **one-time partial withdrawal** (including RMD when transactionSubType is `rmd`).
endpoints.responseCodesAndMediaTypes: 200: application/json; 400: application/json; 401: application/json; 403: application/json; 404: application/json; 405: application/json; 406: application/json; 409: application/json; 413: application/json; 415: application/json; 422: application/json; 429: application/json; 500: application/json; 502: application/json; 503: application/json; 504: application/json

schemas.name: Charges
schemas.description: Details of fees and deductions requested to be applied

schemas.name: EntityIdentity
schemas.description: Schema for entity identity data

schemas.name: EntityParty
schemas.description: Schema for entity party data

schemas.name: FullSurrenderQuoteRequest
schemas.description: Request payload to compute a full surrender quote. Mirrors the Full Surrender submission shape.

schemas.name: FundDistribution
schemas.description: Fund distribution details for the withdrawal

schemas.name: IndividualIdentity
schemas.description: Schema for individual identity data

schemas.name: IndividualParty
schemas.description: Schema for individual party data

schemas.name: LoanDeduction
schemas.description: Loan-related deductions that reduce the net disbursement.

schemas.name: OneTimePartialWithdrawalQuoteRequest
schemas.description: Request to perform a one-time partial withdrawal.

schemas.name: Party
schemas.description: The parties object represents the policy parties relevant to the withdrawal (owners, annuitants, beneficiaries, etc.), along with their identity, relationship, and payout instructions.

schemas.name: PartyRelationship
schemas.description: Schema for party relationship data

schemas.name: PartyRequest
schemas.description: The parties object represents the policy parties relevant to the withdrawal (owners, annuitants, beneficiaries, etc.), along with their identity, relationship, and payout instructions.

schemas.name: PayeeOrBeneficiary
schemas.description: The payeeOrBeneficiary object represents how the withdrawal proceeds are distributed and to whom. It includes payment form, allocation rules for each payee.

schemas.name: PayeeOrBeneficiaryRequest
schemas.description: The payeeOrBeneficiary object represents how the withdrawal proceeds are distributed and to whom. It includes payment form, allocation rules for each payee.

schemas.name: Producer
schemas.description: Information about the producer submitting the request

schemas.name: RmdInfo
schemas.description: RMD details specific to partial one-time withdrawals

schemas.name: TaxQualification
schemas.description: TEFRA/TEMRA and related tax qualification fields returned with the quote.

schemas.name: TaxWithholdingInstruction
schemas.description: List of tax withholding instruction entries

schemas.name: TransactionAmountsFullRequest
schemas.description: Details of financial amounts associated with the full surrender request

schemas.name: TransactionAmountsFullSurrender
schemas.required: appliedAmount, totalChargeAmount, totalTaxWithheldAmount, netPaymentAmount, disbursementType, disbursementPaymentForm

schemas.name: TransactionAmountsRequest
schemas.description: Details of financial amounts associated with the partial withdrawal request
